description: Publish the 'ne_countries' table from the PostGIS database (host: 'gs-postgis', port: 5432, db: 'gis', user: 'geoserver', pass: 'geoserver123') as a layer in GeoServer (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/, credentials: admin/Admin123!). The layer must be published from a new PostGIS data store named 'postgis_natural_earth' within the 'cite' workspace and include computed bounding boxes.
